title: Bridge Essay: A Systematic Review of Transcendent States Across Meditation and Contemplative T

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Formless absorption — meditative absorption, samadhi, jhana, trance states, transcendental meditation, non-ordinary states of consciousness.

**A Systematic Review of Transcendent States Across Meditation and Contemplative Traditions.** — Explore (NY). PMID: 29269049. DOI: 10.1016/j.explore.2017.07.007. Across cultures and throughout history, transcendent states achieved through meditative practices have been reported. The practices to attain transcendent states vary from transcendental meditation to yoga to contemplative prayer, to other various forms of sitting meditation. While these transcendent states are ascribed many different terms, those who experience them describe asimilar unitive, ineffable state of consciousness.
